requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Requirement and GSO/Kuwait Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 能效要求与 GSO/科威特能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效要求與 GSO/科威特能效標籤

summary.en: LED lamps and luminaires entering Kuwait are subject to the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency labelling regime for lighting products, administered alongside KUCAS under PAI. In-scope products must be assessed for luminous efficacy (lm/W) and carry the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label indicating an efficiency class before placement on the market. The labelling and minimum-efficiency framework follows the GCC GSO energy-efficiency standards for lighting (the regional counterpart to a minimum-performance plus label scheme). Products are rated and tested for the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait supply, and the label is normally affixed to packaging. Confirm the current efficacy thresholds and label format with PAI/GSO for the specific lamp category.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的 LED 灯及灯具须遵守照明产品的 GSO/科威特能效标签制度，该制度与 KUCAS 一并由 PAI 管理。范围内产品在上市前须就光效（lm/W）进行评估，并加贴标明能效等级的 GSO/科威特能效标签。该标签及最低能效框架遵循 GCC GSO 照明能效标准（区域性的最低性能加标签方案对应物）。产品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电源定额并检测，标签通常加贴于包装。请就具体灯类别向 PAI/GSO 核实现行光效阈值及标签格式。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的 LED 燈及燈具須遵守照明產品的 GSO/科威特能效標籤制度，該制度與 KUCAS 一併由 PAI 管理。範圍內產品在上市前須就光效（lm/W）進行評估，並加貼標明能效等級的 GSO/科威特能效標籤。該標籤及最低能效框架遵循 GCC GSO 照明能效標準（區域性的最低性能加標籤方案對應物）。產品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電源定額並檢測，標籤通常加貼於包裝。請就具體燈類別向 PAI/GSO 核實現行光效閾值及標籤格式。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS / PAI — Kuwait energy-efficiency labelling for lighting products
GSO energy-efficiency standards for lighting products (GCC GSO regional energy-efficiency / labelling framework)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for CN market entry. China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP using absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label and the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值管理。中国能效标识与 GSO/科威特能效标签之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）註冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值管理。中國能效標識與 GSO/科威特能效標籤之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China (GB 30255 + China Energy Label) and Kuwait (GSO/Kuwait energy label) operate efficacy-based energy-labelling schemes, but they are separate and non-mutual: a China Energy Label registration does not satisfy the GSO/Kuwait label, and a product's CN grade does not map onto the GSO/Kuwait class. Key gaps: (1) the GSO/Kuwait label must be obtained and affixed for in-scope products entering Kuwait, in addition to or independent of the CN label; (2) efficacy must be substantiated at the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz condition rather than China's 220 V (the 50 Hz frequency matches); (3) the current GSO/Kuwait efficacy thresholds and label artwork/format differ from China's grade boundaries and must be checked with PAI/GSO; (4) the labelling sits alongside KUCAS conformity, not as a substitute for it. Manufacturers should verify the applicable GSO/Kuwait efficacy class and produce Kuwait-market label artwork.
gap.zh: 中国（GB 30255 + 中国能效标识）与科威特（GSO/科威特能效标签）均采用基于光效的能效标签方案，但二者独立且不互认：中国能效标识注册不满足 GSO/科威特标签，产品的中国等级也不能映射到 GSO/科威特等级。主要差距：（1）进入科威特的范围内产品须取得并加贴 GSO/科威特标签，与中国标签并存或独立；（2）光效须按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 条件证明，而非中国 220 V（50 Hz 频率一致）；（3）现行 GSO/科威特光效阈值及标签图样/格式不同于中国等级界限，须向 PAI/GSO 核实；（4）该标签与 KUCAS 符合性并存，而非其替代。制造商应核实适用的 GSO/科威特能效等级并制作科威特市场标签图样。
gap.zht: 中國（GB 30255 + 中國能效標識）與科威特（GSO/科威特能效標籤）均採用基於光效的能效標籤方案，但二者獨立且不互認：中國能效標識註冊不滿足 GSO/科威特標籤，產品的中國等級也不能映射到 GSO/科威特等級。主要差距：（1）進入科威特的範圍內產品須取得並加貼 GSO/科威特標籤，與中國標籤並存或獨立；（2）光效須按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 條件證明，而非中國 220 V（50 Hz 頻率一致）；（3）現行 GSO/科威特光效閾值及標籤圖樣/格式不同於中國等級界限，須向 PAI/GSO 核實；（4）該標籤與 KUCAS 符合性並存，而非其替代。製造商應核實適用的 GSO/科威特能效等級並製作科威特市場標籤圖樣。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope lighting — GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label and efficacy assessment required before Kuwait market placement (verify current thresholds and format with PAI/GSO)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label registration with CQC/CECP required under GB 30255-2019; Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the CN market-entry minimum

source.publisher: PAI — Public Authority for Industry, Kuwait (energy-efficiency labelling)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lamps and luminaires entering Kuwait require a GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label and an efficacy assessment, administered alongside KUCAS by PAI. This is the Kuwait counterpart to the EU Ecodesign/energy-label regime and is separate and non-mutual with China's GB 30255 / China Energy Label — a CN registration does not carry over, and CN grades do not map onto the GSO/Kuwait class. Efficacy should be substantiated at 240 V, 50 Hz. Verify the current efficacy thresholds and label format with PAI/GSO for the specific lamp category before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的 LED 灯及灯具须取得 GSO/科威特能效标签并进行光效评估，由 PAI 与 KUCAS 一并管理。这是欧盟生态设计/能效标签制度的科威特对应物，与中国 GB 30255 / 中国能效标识独立且不互认——中国注册不能延用，中国等级也不能映射到 GSO/科威特等级。光效应按 240 V、50 Hz 证明。出货前请就具体灯类别向 PAI/GSO 核实现行光效阈值及标签格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的 LED 燈及燈具須取得 GSO/科威特能效標籤並進行光效評估，由 PAI 與 KUCAS 一併管理。這是歐盟生態設計/能效標籤制度的科威特對應物，與中國 GB 30255 / 中國能效標識獨立且不互認——中國註冊不能延用，中國等級也不能映射到 GSO/科威特等級。光效應按 240 V、50 Hz 證明。出貨前請就具體燈類別向 PAI/GSO 核實現行光效閾值及標籤格式。

requirement_topic.en: KUCAS Conformity Route, Importer of Record and Per-Shipment Certificate vs CCC
requirement_topic.zh: KUCAS 合格评定路径、进口主体与逐批证书 vs CCC
requirement_topic.zht: KUCAS 合格評定路徑、進口主體與逐批證書 vs CCC

summary.en: Market access to Kuwait for LED products runs through KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) administered by PAI (Public Authority for Industry). The typical route is: (1) a PAI-recognised conformity body reviews product test evidence and issues a Technical Evaluation Report covering the applicable GSO standards (safety, EMC, photobiological, energy efficiency as applicable); (2) a Certificate of Conformity is issued, commonly on a per-shipment basis, which must be presented for customs clearance at Shuwaikh or Shuaiba ports; (3) a registered in-country Kuwaiti importer / agent acts as the legal entry party. Goods are evaluated for the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait grid. Without a valid KUCAS Certificate of Conformity, regulated lighting products are not released by Kuwait customs.
summary.zh: LED 产品进入科威特市场须经由公共工业局（PAI）管理的 KUCAS（科威特符合性保证计划）。典型路径为：（1）PAI 认可的合格评定机构审查产品检测证据，并签发涵盖适用 GSO 标准（安全、EMC、光生物、能效（如适用））的技术评估报告；（2）签发符合性证书，通常按逐批方式，须在舒韦赫或舒艾巴港口清关时出示；（3）由注册的科威特本地进口商/代理作为合法准入主体。货物按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电网评估。无有效 KUCAS 符合性证书，受管制照明产品不获科威特海关放行。
summary.zht: LED 產品進入科威特市場須經由公共工業局（PAI）管理的 KUCAS（科威特符合性保證計劃）。典型路徑為：（1）PAI 認可的合格評定機構審查產品檢測證據，並簽發涵蓋適用 GSO 標準（安全、EMC、光生物、能效（如適用））的技術評估報告；（2）簽發符合性證書，通常按逐批方式，須在舒韋赫或舒艾巴港口清關時出示；（3）由註冊的科威特本地進口商/代理作為合法准入主體。貨物按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電網評估。無有效 KUCAS 符合性證書，受管制照明產品不獲科威特海關放行。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS — Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (PAI / Public Authority for Industry)
GSO standards as adopted by Kuwait (lighting safety, EMC, photobiological, energy efficiency)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body such as CQC. CCC is a product/type certification rather than a per-shipment conformity certificate, and customs release in China is not gated on a per-consignment certificate in the same way. For wireless luminaires, SRRC type approval applies. CCC and SRRC are China-specific and are not recognised under KUCAS.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证。CCC 为产品/型式认证，而非逐批符合性证书，中国海关放行并非以逐批证书同样方式把关。对于无线灯具，适用 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 与 SRRC 为中国特有，不被 KUCAS 所承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證。CCC 為產品/型式認證，而非逐批符合性證書，中國海關放行並非以逐批證書同樣方式把關。對於無線燈具，適用 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 與 SRRC 為中國特有，不被 KUCAS 所承認。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The structural gap is the conformity model: China's CCC is a type certification, whereas Kuwait's KUCAS commonly requires a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity presented at the port. Key differences with no CN equivalent: (1) a per-consignment Certificate of Conformity is needed for customs release at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba — type-level CCC does not satisfy this; (2) a registered Kuwaiti in-country importer/agent must be the legal entry party (analogous in function to an authorised representative, but a Kuwait-specific requirement); (3) test evidence must map to the GSO-adopted standards and be accepted by a PAI-recognised conformity body — CCC reports cannot be reused directly; (4) products must be confirmed at 240 V, 50 Hz. Manufacturers should engage a KUCAS conformity body and a Kuwaiti importer early, and budget for per-shipment certification rather than a one-time approval.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于合格评定模式：中国 CCC 为型式认证，而科威特 KUCAS 通常要求在港口出示逐批符合性证书。无中国对应的主要差异：（1）须有逐批符合性证书供舒韦赫/舒艾巴海关放行——型式级 CCC 不满足此项；（2）须由注册的科威特本地进口商/代理作为合法准入主体（功能上类似授权代表，但为科威特特有要求）；（3）检测证据须对应 GSO 采用的标准并为 PAI 认可的合格评定机构所接受——CCC 报告不可直接复用；（4）产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 确认。制造商应尽早委托 KUCAS 合格评定机构及科威特进口商，并按逐批认证而非一次性核准做预算。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於合格評定模式：中國 CCC 為型式認證，而科威特 KUCAS 通常要求在港口出示逐批符合性證書。無中國對應的主要差異：（1）須有逐批符合性證書供舒韋赫/舒艾巴海關放行——型式級 CCC 不滿足此項；（2）須由註冊的科威特本地進口商/代理作為合法准入主體（功能上類似授權代表，但為科威特特有要求）；（3）檢測證據須對應 GSO 採用的標準並為 PAI 認可的合格評定機構所接受——CCC 報告不可直接複用；（4）產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 確認。製造商應盡早委託 KUCAS 合格評定機構及科威特進口商，並按逐批認證而非一次性核准做預算。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report plus per-shipment Certificate of Conformity required for customs release; registered in-country Kuwaiti importer required as legal entry party
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01 (type certification); SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless luminaires

source.publisher: PAI — Public Authority for Industry, Kuwait (KUCAS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kuwait market access for LED products runs through KUCAS via PAI: a Technical Evaluation Report against GSO-adopted standards plus a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity presented for customs release at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba, with a registered Kuwaiti importer as the legal entry party. This differs structurally from China's type-based CCC — CCC and SRRC are not recognised, reports cannot be reused directly, and products must be confirmed at 240 V, 50 Hz. Engage a KUCAS conformity body and Kuwaiti importer early and budget for per-shipment certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 产品进入科威特须经 PAI 的 KUCAS：针对 GSO 采用标准的技术评估报告加逐批符合性证书，于舒韦赫/舒艾巴海关放行时出示，并由注册的科威特进口商作为合法准入主体。这与中国基于型式的 CCC 在结构上不同——CCC 与 SRRC 不被承认，报告不可直接复用，产品须按 240 V、50 Hz 确认。应尽早委托 KUCAS 合格评定机构及科威特进口商，并按逐批认证做预算。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 產品進入科威特須經 PAI 的 KUCAS：針對 GSO 採用標準的技術評估報告加逐批符合性證書，於舒韋赫/舒艾巴海關放行時出示，並由註冊的科威特進口商作為合法准入主體。這與中國基於型式的 CCC 在結構上不同——CCC 與 SRRC 不被承認，報告不可直接複用，產品須按 240 V、50 Hz 確認。應盡早委託 KUCAS 合格評定機構及科威特進口商，並按逐批認證做預算。
